resources.string: Today\'s date, progress ring, task list, and daily quote. Resize the widget for more layouts.
Compact summary: date, progress, optional quote, or Todo layout (1×1 Todo) in settings.
Date, task list, and daily quote. Configure layout and background in widget settings.
Wide strip: yesterday / today (four time-block cards) / tomorrow; other layouts in settings.
Month heatmap and tasks. Choose today-only or full-month mode in settings.
Voice input is not supported on this device
Experimental premium interface with water-lily atmosphere and glass navigation
This action is irreversible. All data will be permanently deleted. Are you sure?
Tap a card to edit topic meaning. Freestyle cannot be changed.
This default category cannot be edited
Welcome to Kairos. We value your privacy. Notes, tasks, and mood data are processed on device. Full policy will follow in a later release.
The wind rises; I keep going.
M T W T F S S
I have been planning every day for
Past: perfect / great / cheer / sprout / notes-only / blank. Future (muted): scheduled / free.
You’re among the first Kairos users—your feedback matters. Suggestions welcome!
No browser app found to open this link
Overwrite deletes existing notes, tasks, and moods before import. Continue?
This note will be moved to trash.
This note is in a project — choose a topic first
Add summary and secondary category first
You can link at most 2 topic categories
This note is published. Open it from the timeline or topic view, expand the card, and use Change topic, Change project, or Continue. Full-body editing is not available here.
Add projects to organize your notes
Load sample tasks to explore, or start from an empty list.
Linked topics cannot duplicate the primary topic
Topic notes require a summary and a secondary category
All notes in Trash will be permanently deleted. This cannot be undone.
This note will be permanently deleted and cannot be recovered.
Reminds you to check today\'s tasks at the scheduled time
Reminds you to write today\'s reflection
Alerts for individual tasks at a chosen time
You still have tasks today — tap to view
Journaled today? Tap to write your reflection
You can have at most %1$d incomplete tasks per day. Clear tasks for that day to add more.
Select a note as daily quote
The wind rises; I keep going.
No inspiration waiting to be organized
Import done: +%1$d notes, +%2$d tasks, +%3$d moods, %4$d conflicts
You still have tasks today — tap to view
Journaled today? Tap to write a reflection
Perfect this month: %1$d days Great: %2$d days\n
3 more — open the app to view
Update each time you open the app
Today’s line: A bright heart, a steady stride
